en_title: Insomniac Responds to Wolverine Fan to Confirm Physical Edition Includes a Disc in the Box and I Suspect More Devs Will Have to Answer This Question in a Post-GTA 6 World
subtitle: 光盘还在
opus_summary: Insomniac Games回应玩家疑问，确认《金刚狼》实体版将包含光盘，并非仅下载码。此前《GTA6》宣布实体版仅提供下载码，引发巨大争议。

paragraphs.en: Insomniac Games has responded to a fan on social media who asked if the physical version of Marvel's Wolverine is just a code in the box — with the question now top of mind following Rockstar’s shock decision not to sell GTA 6 on disc at launch.
paragraphs.cn: Insomniac Games在社交媒体上回应了一位粉丝，他问《漫威金刚狼》实体版是否只是盒子里一个下载码——此前Rockstar惊人决定发售时不提供《GTA6》光盘版，这一问题随之成为关注焦点。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Rockstar confirmed the physical version of GTA 6 comes with a download code inside the box . There is no disc.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，Rockstar确认《GTA6》实体版盒内附下载码，没有光盘。

paragraphs.en: This has proven to be a huge talking point, with some fans even saying they won’t buy the game because of it. Video game preservation enthusiasts have criticised Rockstar , and some retailers have even refused to sell the game because of it .
paragraphs.cn: 此事已成为巨大话题，一些粉丝甚至表示因此不会购买游戏。游戏保存爱好者批评了Rockstar，部分零售商甚至因此拒绝销售这款游戏。

paragraphs.en: One follow-up question is, has Rockstar just hit the final nail in the coffin for the video game disc? If a game like GTA 6, which is expected to be the biggest entertainment launch of all time, skips releasing on a disc, will other rival game companies follow suit? It's a question we put to analysts, who insist Rockstar's decision just makes commercial sense .
paragraphs.cn: 随之而来的问题是：Rockstar是否就此给游戏光盘钉上了最后一颗钉子？如果像《GTA6》这样被预期为史上最大娱乐发售的作品都不出光盘，其他竞争对手会效仿吗？我们向分析师提出了这个问题，他们坚称Rockstar的决定纯粹出于商业考虑。

paragraphs.en: For now, with the GTA 6 situation fresh in mind, it looks like developers and publishers will have to answer an increasing number of questions around the physical versions of their games. Sony-owned studio Insomniac was asked if Marvel’s Wolverine, due out in September, will be released on disc or as a code in a box, and in a tweet the studio responded: “the physical version will include a disc in box.”
paragraphs.cn: 眼下《GTA6》风波未平，开发商和发行商恐怕要面对越来越多关于自家游戏实体版的疑问。索尼旗下工作室Insomniac被问及定于9月发售的《漫威金刚狼》会以光盘还是盒装兑换码形式发行，工作室在推文中回应：「实体版盒内会有一张光盘。」

paragraphs.en: That response is clear, but it has also been viewed over 1.1 million times — evidence, surely, of the GTA 6 effect. Certainly Rockstar has changed the game here, and I suspect every triple-A developer and publisher will be asked the same question from now on, more often than they would have been otherwise. Will EA release the next FC game on disc, for example? Could Call of Duty do the same? Will Sony eventually do it?
paragraphs.cn: 这个回应很明确，但已被浏览超过110万次——这无疑是《GTA6》效应的证据。Rockstar无疑改变了游戏规则，我猜想从现在起，每一家3A开发商和发行商都会被问及同样的问题，频率远超以往。比如EA下一款FC游戏会出光盘吗？《使命召唤》会不会如法炮制？索尼最终也会这样做吗？

paragraphs.en: Nintendo has dabbled with releasing physical versions with just a code in the box with its controversial Game Key-Card releases for the Switch 2. It’s been as helping improve the performance of games because they are downloaded to the console's internal memory. With GTA 6, which is set for launch on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X and S only, there are all sorts of theories. Analysts have suggested to IGN that the decision was in part about Rockstar's desire to avoid damaging leaks that might have emerged from releasing a disc into a pre-release supply chain. They've also explained that releasing GTA 6 without a disc will cut manufacturing costs and make Rockstar more money because it can subsequently control the price of the game. Rockstar has yet to explain its decision.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂在Switch 2上试行了颇具争议的Game Key-Card，即实体版盒内只带下载码的销售方式。由于游戏会下载到主机内部存储，这种做法有助于提升游戏性能。至于GTA6，这款游戏预计仅登陆PS5和XBOX Series，各界对此众说纷纭。分析师向IGN表示，Rockstar这么做部分原因是为了防止实体光盘进入预发售供应链而导致的破坏性泄露。他们还解释称，发售不带光盘的GTA6能削减制造成本，并且由于Rockstar之后可以控制游戏定价，还能赚更多钱。Rockstar尚未对此决定做出解释。

paragraphs.en: We’ve got plenty more on GTA 6 preorders for you, including analyst opinion on what GTA 6’s $80 price point means for other video games and the tech expert verdict on the 63 new GTA 6 screenshots .
paragraphs.cn: 关于GTA6的预订，我们还有海量内容，包括分析师对GTA6 80美元(约合人民币545元)（约合576元人民币）定价对其他游戏影响的看法，以及科技专家对63张GTA6新截图的评测。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上找到他 @wyp100。可发送邮件至wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me以保密方式联系。
